indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX journal_entries_pkey ON public.journal_entries USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX journal_entries_user_id_entry_date_key ON public.journal_entries USING btree (user_id, entry_date)
CREATE INDEX journal_entries_user_updated_idx ON public.journal_entries USING btree (user_id, updated_at)
CREATE INDEX journal_user_date_idx ON public.journal_entries USING btree (user_id, entry_date DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX notes_pkey ON public.notes USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX notes_updated_at_idx ON public.notes USING btree (updated_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX notes_user_id_idx ON public.notes USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX notes_user_updated_idx ON public.notes USING btree (user_id, updated_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX simple_list_pkey ON public.simple_list USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX simple_list_user_updated_idx ON public.simple_list USING btree (user_id, updated_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tasks_pkey ON public.tasks USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX tasks_series_id_idx ON public.tasks USING btree (series_id)
CREATE INDEX tasks_user_id_idx ON public.tasks USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX tasks_user_updated_idx ON public.tasks USING btree (user_id, updated_at)
CREATE INDEX tracker_entries_metric_idx ON public.tracker_entries USING btree (metric_id, recorded_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tracker_entries_pkey ON public.tracker_entries USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX tracker_entries_user_updated_idx ON public.tracker_entries USING btree (user_id, updated_at)

CREATE INDEX tracker_metrics_user_updated_idx ON public.tracker_metrics USING btree (user_id, updated_at)
